scenes.speaker: tessa
scenes.text: Oh no! Someone has left a secret message in the school library.

scenes.speaker: tessa
scenes.text: The message looks strange. Can you help me decode it?

scenes.speaker: tessa
scenes.text: We will learn how letters can be shifted to create secret codes.

activities.title: Shift The Alphabet
activities.description: Move each letter forward by one position.

activities.title: Encode A Message
activities.description: Use a shift of 3 to encode a secret message.

questions.question: If A becomes B and B becomes C, what does C become?
questions.hint: Move one step forward in the alphabet.

questions.question: CAESAR encrypted with a shift of 3 begins with which letter?
Roy's favourite number has 3 letters and twice as many vowels as consonants. Which number is it?
Which number name comes second in dictionary order?
Which word has exactly one vowel?

bossChallenge.title: Decode The Secret Scroll
bossChallenge.description: Solve all puzzles to reveal the hidden message.
bossChallenge.finalMessage: Excellent work! You helped Tessa decode the secret message.

aiTutorPrompts.hintMode: Give a small hint without revealing the answer.
aiTutorPrompts.explainMode: Explain the concept in a simple Class 3 friendly way.
aiTutorPrompts.storyMode: Explain using a fun story involving Tessa.
